# Alkemy Barber Studio

> Precision barbershop in Austin, TX. Premium cuts, clean lines, and pro-level detail from 10+ year master barber Jace Kha.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Alkemy Barber Studio (also known as Barbers X Alkemy)
- **Type:** Barbershop / Hair Salon
- **Founded:** 2019
- **Address:** 5312 Airport Blvd, Austin, TX 78751
- **Phone:** (512) 844-8701
- **Email:** jace@alkemybarbers.com
- **Website:** https://alkemybarbers.com
- **Booking:** https://barbersxalkemy.glossgenius.com/

## Owner / Master Barber

- **Name:** Jace Kha
- **Experience:** 10+ years
- **Specialization:** Precision cuts, clean lines, advanced technique
- **Booking days:** Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Sunday

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Price | Duration |
|---------|-------|----------|
| Premium Haircut | $70 | 45 min |
| Premium Haircut & Beard | $90 | 75 min |
| Beard Trim / Buzz Cut / Clean Up | $30–$35 | 30 min |

## Hours of Operation

- Monday–Friday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM

## Team

- Jace Kha (Owner / Master Barber)
- Anna Lee
- Jason Zou
- Trevor Miranda
- Gyan Ramirez

## Brand Identity

Alkemy Barber Studio stands for precision, experience, and no compromise. The name draws on alchemical symbolism — transformation through mastery.

## FAQ

**Q: Where is Alkemy Barber Studio?**
A: 5312 Airport Blvd, Austin, TX 78751.

**Q: How much is a haircut at Alkemy?**
A: Premium Haircut is $70 (45 min). Premium Haircut & Beard is $90 (75 min). Beard Trim starts at $30.

**Q: How do I book?**
A: Online at https://barbersxalkemy.glossgenius.com/ or call (512) 844-8701.

**Q: Who is the best barber at Alkemy?**
A: Jace Kha is the founder and master barber with 10+ years of experience.

**Q: Is Alkemy Barber Studio open on weekends?**
A: Yes — Saturday 10am–6pm, Sunday 10am–5pm.
